feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Analytics Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP Analytics Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Given a date, how to find the nearest Monday using SAC Data Action
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Given a date in integer format, how to find the nearest Monday of it in SAP SAC data action. 

We have a date in interger format in a measure called: "Shipment Date", that will be entered by the planner, and we need to find the nearest Monday after 10 days, that's the max "Delivery by Date".

So, for example, Shipment date is: 05/27/2024,  the delivery date should be calculated as: 06/03/2024, instead of 06/10/2024, as this is the nearest Monday to date: 06/06/2024, when added 10 days to 05/27/2024. 

Thanks,

SP

entry.title: SAC date picker for the last 90 days
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

Is there any way in SAC to set up a date picker filter that always selects the last 90 days from the current date?

We need a date picker for an analysis because the dynamic filter and the lookback do not allow selecting a single date or a specific week in the past.

Thank you!

entry.title: I need to buy SAP Analytics cloud trial base
entry.content: My trial for SAP Analytics cloud ends within 7 days. Anyway to buy it

entry.title: Connection to BW - Hebrew
entry.content:
Connection to BW - Hebrew

I connect the SAC to the BW system using live connection

When i present the data in a story table all the des is not showing good

What can be the reason

entry.title: List of users authorized for reports in SAC
entry.content:
Hello everyone
Is there a list in SAC where we can see which users have or do not have authorization on which reports?

entry.title: SAP Analytics cloud: table filters disappear when removing/moving a page
entry.content:
Hi!

 We have a story with some pages.
On the first page there is a table with some dimension in rows, some measures in columns and some filters.
We notice that if we try to remove or move the second page, the table on the other page loses all the filters.
In the page that we want to remove/move there are not objects linked to the table on the other page.
The same happens when removing/moving a blank page.
We use stories in optimized mode with canvas pages.
We encountered the same problem both on existing stories and on new stories.
Can you please help us?
Thanks

#sac #table #table

entry.title: Messages in SAC Handling with BW Live Connection
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

  I am working with stories in SAC with a live connection to BW/BPC. There are certain parameterized messages in BW that appear when I execute them in SAC. However, in SAC, the red messages stay while the others disappear. In my case, the validation messages are yellow warnings that disappear from the SAC screen after 10 seconds. I would like to know if it is possible to retrieve these messages and save or expose them in some way so that the user can review them without them disappearing. I cannot find any functionality or property to retrieve these messages from the system. Is there any container or functionality I can use to handle the messages?

Thanks in advance,

entry.title: How to rename cell Totals - SAP Analytics Cloud
entry.content:
Hi to the community,

I would like some help with SAP Analytics Cloud.
Is it possible to:
 - rename the "Totals" cell?
 - hide the total of the "Tonnes" column - value 335.000.

Thanks in advance.

 

Regards,

entry.title: Data Action to create values for existing dimension members but yet no values
entry.content:
Hi all,

i am trying to create a Data action which creates a specific value (zero, not Null) for a given time horizont and for the members of each dimension I selected beforehand via prompt.

First approach:

MEMBERSET[d/Dim1]= %Paramater1%

MEMBERSET[d/Dim2]= %Paramater2%

etc...

Data([d/Measures] ="Measure1")=0

also etc...

This DA only writes back zeroes for already existing values.

My desire is to "fill in" the null values with zeroes in this case.

Any idea? TYIA

entry.title: How to calculate Average on the Non-zero and Non-null values using Advanced Formulas
entry.content:
Dear SAC Experts,

Using Advanced Formulas, I would like to calculate the Average FTE value of the 'Actual' months and store the result in the the remaining 'Forecast' months.

The Actual & Forecast months are flagged by a property (FORECAST_FLAG) on the MONTH dimension.

Using the below code I was able to calculate it but I have hardcoded the number of Actual Months (to 10) and I would like to make it dynamic based on the number of Actual Months.

Result look like this:

Also, I would like to ignore the Zero & Null values and calculate average only based on the populated values, i.e. not always divide the total by the same number of months.

Could anyone of you please help with the code.

Thanks,

Sreekar

entry.title: What is deffrence Sales Organization and Sales Unit in SAP Business Bydesign?
entry.content: The deffrence Sales Organization and Sales Unit in SAP Business Sales Organization and Sales Unit

entry.title: SAC - Disable System Error Messages with a correlation id
entry.content:
Hi,

is it possible to switch off such messages in SAC stories?
The message comes before code from OnInit is loading.

BR
Alex

entry.title: The current widget is already exporting, or there are more than 20 exports started.
entry.content:
Hello everyone,
After the last update, the scripts that trigger Excel Export in our reports do not work.
When I click on the relevant button containing the Excel Export Script, no notification appears on the screen and the download does not start. When you press the same button again to make sure whether the button is clicked or not, the following notification appears:

Then, when I press F12 and enter the console, it gives a warning like this:

We did not have such a problem before the last update and we have not made any changes to these scripts for a very long time. Anyone experiencing a similar problem?

entry.title: Sac - Get all dimension comment from a table
entry.content:
hi Expert, 

i need to retrieve all "dimension comments" in a table via javascript.

i tried the following code: 

var a = Table_Input.getComments().getDimensionComment(Table_Input.getSelections()[0]);
console.log(a);

This code works if I select the single row. But what if I need to retrieve a complete array of the table?

Any suggestion? 

thanks a lot

SAP Analytics Cloud  #dimensioncomment

entry.title: Update Member properties of SAC model via API
entry.content:
Dear Members ,

Our business requirement is to send details from SAC to SF , But we want to also update the member status of the data was send successfully to SF .

I am aware about the export API, Could you let me know if this is possible for we can update a member's details via an API from external middleware like SAP CPI?

entry.title: Edit Calculation not enabled in sap sac story created from others
entry.content:
Hi ,

I am new to SAC space and I have full admin access in SAC .

I am able to create and edit calculations  what i created  story's but I am unable to edit calculation ( Fx , below screen  ) which is some other developers created story's . 

Please advise what is the cause and advise if any inputs to edit calculations created from others  .

Thanks,

Chanti

entry.title: How to get geolocation data through CDS view?
entry.content:
Hello guys,

for a dashboard we need to add in the geomap in the SAP Analytics Cloud. For this we've created a custom Query and custom cds views.

For the geolocation data we query it in a dimension like so:

define view ZD_SD_CUSTLOC as select from geot005 {
    @Semantics.address.country: true
    key land1 as Country,
    @Semantics.geoLocation.longitude: true
    longitude,
    @Semantics.geoLocation.latitude: true
    latitude,
    altitude
}

Sadly, when tryign to use these as a Location Dimension in a geomap, we simply get the warning "Location Dimension required", with the list of the associated objects being empty.

What is needed that the Dimension gets recognized as a Location Dimension?

entry.title: SAP Analytics Cloud - Copy Value from one Dimension Member to another Dimension Member in runtime
entry.content:
Hi friends, 

my requirement is to mirror the value on a specific G/L Account to another G/L Account. 

So the scenario is like this:

The planner Enters a value on G/L Account A. The SAC now copies/mirrors the value to G/L Account B in runtime. 

I have following idea:

OnResultChanged-Event:

var resultSet = Table_1.getDataSource().getResultSet();
console.log(resultSet);
for (var i = 0; i < resultSet.length; i++)
{
var value=resultSet[i]["G/L_Account"].rawValue;
var conv_value=ConvertUtils.stringToInteger(value);

if (conv_value!==0)
{
DataACtion_1.execute();

Iam wondering if I can restrict this Script explicit to G/L Account A. So only when the Value on A is changed the Data Action is executed.

Any ideas on this?

Kind regards,

Ismail

entry.title: Unsupported and won't be available :- No Linked Dimension is use for Blended Visualization
entry.content:
SAP have indicated that they won’t be supporting blended charts that don’t include the linked dimension.

There may be a number of situations where you don’t want to include the linked dimensions e.g. technical database key with no meaning to the user.

Is there an easy workaround to this e.g. hiding the extra field? 

Example :- 

Model blends:

  • SAC usage activities

  • SAC user details

linked on dimension user_id

 

In the classic Stories , we can just have dimensons = "Name " and the chart can be seen.

 

In the optimized mode ,

dimensions = name, user_id

User id needs to be included as the linked dimension .

 

Understand that SAP won't support but can you please help us with the work around to hide the User_id in the optimized mode or handle such scenarios.

entry.title: How to define user authorization for SAC with Public Cloud in Cloud Identity Services?
entry.content:
Hello everyone

We have a SAC system connected to the Public Cloud. In Cloud Identity Services, the user role is Constant and Embedded BI Admin is given. In other words, everyone who has a user in the Public Cloud also has a user in the SAC, and all users have Admin authority.

However, instead, only some users should be defined as SAC users and only a few of these users should be given Admin authority. Is there any way to achieve this?

 

Thanks in advance.
